disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intense night-worse itch with thread-like burrows in the finger webs and itchy scrotal nodules; a close contact (spouse) now itching too
trigger_question_examples: Is the itch much worse at night, with tiny thread-like tracks in the finger webs, and is a close contact itching too?
Any itchy lumps on the genitals?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, it's far worse at night, there are thread-like tracks in my finger webs, itchy lumps on my scrotum, and my wife is now itching too.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No thick honey-crusting, spreading hot redness or fever from the scratched skin (secondary-infection screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any golden crusts, spreading hot redness or fever on the scratched areas?
Is any area getting hot, swollen or oozing pus?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No golden crusts, no spreading hot redness and no fever — just raw scratches.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not widespread thick scaly crusts over large areas (widespread-crusting screen)
trigger_question_examples: Do you have thick scaly crusts over large areas of skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No thick widespread crusts — it's itchy bumps and scratches; I'm otherwise healthy.
